summary: Backend testing completed for differentiated invoice conditions by document type. All 17 tests PASSED (100%). The feature correctly implements 4 distinct conditions fields (conditions_devis, conditions_facture, conditions_acompte, conditions_solde) with proper GET/PUT API support and PDF generation logic.
seed_data_creation: Test invoices created and cleaned up automatically during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Invoice conditions differentiation feature is fully implemented and tested. The 4 conditions fields are: conditions_devis (for quotes), conditions_facture (for standard invoices), conditions_acompte (for deposit invoices), conditions_solde (for balance invoices). Legacy default_conditions field is preserved for backward compatibility.

tests: Returns all 4 conditions fields (conditions_devis, conditions_facture, conditions_acompte, conditions_solde)
Returns legacy default_conditions for backward compatibility
Each conditions field has appropriate default content
Migration: existing settings without new fields get defaults
Updating one condition does not affect others
Fallback to default_conditions when specific field is empty

Frontend Settings Modal.details: 4 distinct textarea fields present in InvoicesPage.jsx settings dialog with proper labels and color coding
